'''Jobe Keely''' was a [[Human/Legends|human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] crewman of ''[[Outbound Flight]]'' in [[27 BBY/Legends|27 BBY]]. Among his onboard technician friends were [[Chas Uliar]] and [[Brace Tarkosa]].<ref name="Outbound Flight" />

Keely later represented the [[Survivors (Outbound Flight)|Survivors]] on the [[Managing Council]] in [[The Redoubt/Legends|the Redoubt]], where ''Outbound Flight'' crash-landed. He was also among those who were evacuated by the [[Chiss/Legends|Chiss]] to the [[Empire of the Hand]].<ref name="Survivor's Quest" />
